design_philosophy: Dark luxury meets ethereal magic. Precision + sophistication. Core metaphor: Light refracting through a crystal — clarity, precision, and beauty emerging from complexity.

general.header: Fixed sticky header with Logo + 4-pill Mood Selector + perf quick-peek + user menu. backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0a0524]/60 z-50
general.sidebar: Collapsible sidebar nav. backdrop-blur-md bg-[#180a3a]/40 border-r border-white/5
general.background: Full-window Three.js tunnel pinned behind all content. z-[-1] fixed inset-0

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Heavy transparency rgba(255,255,255,0.1) to rgba(255,255,255,0.4). backdrop-blur-2xl. Minimal borders (e.g. border border-white/10). Prefer inner glows.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimal drop shadows. Use colored glowing box-shadows. Example: shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(43,240,255,0.15)]
visual_enhancers.borders: Avoid rigid solid borders. Use gradient borders or 1px border-white/5.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Avoid galaxy gradients. Use subtle radial glows and bloom effects.

mood_selector_system.description: Globally affects typography weight, button speed, particle density, bloom intensity, crystal color temp

Deep.effect: Low bloom, deep blue/indigo ambient, slow particles, heavy typography

Review.effect: Balanced bloom, soft cyan glow, steady particles, clear typography

Grind.effect: High bloom, electric cyan and violet flashes, fast particles, energetic typography

Drained.effect: Minimal bloom, dim grey/violet ambient, very few/slow particles, soft/light typography

threejs_tunnel.description: Hero visual is a Three.js wormhole tunnel
threejs_tunnel.specs: Cylindrical tunnel of additive points, SphereGeometry remapped, vertex shader with 3D Simplex noise, fragment shader with radial fade. UnrealBloomPass postprocessing, 300 drifting cyan motes. Scroll warps camera down tunnel; mouse banks flight and repels walls.
threejs_tunnel.confidence_feedback: Crystal glow intensity matches confidence score.

dashboard.layout: Bento grid (Mode B Control Room layout)
dashboard.components: crystal tunnel hero (background), mood selector, quick stats (confidence%, questions answered, topics mastered), resume CTA, recent activity feed

adaptive_quizzing.components: Question card (glassmorphism), confidence slider 1-5, MCQ/free-text input, real-time crystal feedback, progress bar

flashcards.components: 3D card flip with R3F or CSS 3D transforms, confidence marking, spaced repetition stats

ai_chatbot.components: Conversational dialog, mic icon, scrollable history. Chat bubbles with glassmorphism.

pyq_analyzer.components: Filter exam+year, topic frequency heatmap (D3.js or custom grid), recommended order list

performance_analytics.components: Line/bar charts (Recharts with custom glass tooltips), weak area spotlight, confidence distribution, streak badges

rule_20_80_dashboard.components: Ranked topic list, cumulative impact %, time allocation, Focus mode button

auth.components: Emergent Google OAuth login screen. Center glassmorphism card floating in crystal void.

component_styling.pill_buttons: Rounded-full, backdrop-blur-md, bg-white/5 border border-white/10. Active: bg-white/20 border-[#2bf0ff]/50 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(43,240,255,0.3)]
component_styling.confidence_slider: Custom styled range input or interactive div. Track: bg-white/10. Thumb: glowing circle bg-[#2bf0ff] shadow-[0_0_10px_#2bf0ff].
component_styling.question_card: Glassmorphism panel. p-8 rounded-2xl bg-white/[0.03] border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl.
component_styling.flashcard: w-full aspect-[4/3] rounded-2xl relative preserve-3d transition-transform duration-700. Front and back faces with backface-hidden.
component_styling.chat_bubbles: User: bg-white/10 rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm. AI: bg-[#180a3a]/60 border border-[#7a3cff]/30 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm.
component_styling.stat_cards: Flat glass panels, subtle hover lift (-translate-y-1), border border-white/5 hover:border-[#2bf0ff]/30 transition-all duration-300.
component_styling.charts: Recharts with transparent backgrounds, cyan (#2bf0ff) and violet (#7a3cff) lines/bars. No grid lines or very subtle white/5.

animations.page_transitions: Framer Motion fade and slight scale up (0.98 to 1).
animations.panel_reveals: Staggered fade up from bottom (y: 20 to 0).
animations.mood_switch_transitions: Smooth color tweening in Three.js (duration: 1.5s). UI transitions 0.5s ease.
animations.hover_states: Glow intensity increases, borders brighten, slight negative Y translation for cards.

icons.style: Duotone or Regular weight, matched to text color or primary accent.

testing.data_testid: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

user_avatar.description: Professional headshot for user profile avatar.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the Three.js canvas is placed globally and acts as the background for all routes.
Implement the Mood Context to globally share the current mood state, affecting both React UI and Three.js scene parameters.
Adhere strictly to the glassmorphism specifications (heavy transparency, backdrop-blur, subtle inner borders).
Do NOT use standard Shadcn card styles. Customize them to fit the dark luxury glassmorphism look.
Use 'react-icons/fc' FcGoogle for the Google login button instead of an image.
Always add data-testid to interactive elements.
